items.title: Carrick confirmed as Man Utd permanent manager
items.summary: Manchester United confirm the appointment of Michael Carrick as their permanent manager on a two-year contract.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Bangladesh to tour Zimbabwe for all-format series in June-July
items.summary: Upcoming series will mark Zimbabwe's first home assignment this year, and their first international action since the T20 World Cup
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Copying Vaibhav Sooryavanshi would be 'foolish', says Devdutt Padikkal
items.summary: Devdutt Padikkal lauded teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi as a "rare talent," deeming any attempt to replicate his unique batting style "foolish." Sooryavanshi's explosive...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
